title: Qatar National Cryptographic Standard - Version 1.0
description: Official cryptographic standard hosted on the NCSA Qatar Q-CERT subdomain. On inspection it covers conventional symmetric/asymmetric algorithms and does NOT mention post-quantum/quantum-resistant cryptography (fails explicit-PQC test).

title: National Cyber Security Strategy 2024-2030 (NCSA Qatar)
description: NCSA Qatar national strategy page. Five-pillar strategy aligned with Qatar Vision 2030. No explicit mention of post-quantum cryptography surfaced (page is a JS app; not verifiable as PQC-explicit).

title: National Cyber Security Strategy 2024-2030 launch (Government Communications Office)
description: Government Communications Office announcement of the launch of the National Cyber Security Strategy 2024-2030. General cyber, no explicit PQC reference found.

title: National Cyber Security Strategy (Ministry of Transport and Communications - Arabic)
description: Ministry of Transport and Communications Arabic page on the national cyber security strategy. General cyber security; no explicit PQC reference found.

title: Emiri Decision No. 1 of 2021 establishing the National Cyber Security Agency
description: Qatari legal portal (Al Meezan) text of the Emiri decision establishing the NCSA. Foundational instrument; no PQC content.

title: NCSA - Cybersecurity Advisories
description: NCSA Qatar cybersecurity advisories listing page. Index page; no specific PQC advisory surfaced in search.

title: Qatar Common Criteria Scheme (QCCS)
description: NCSA Qatar Common Criteria certification scheme page. Evaluation/certification scheme; no explicit PQC reference found.

title: Future-Proof Encryption with Quantum-Safe PKI (eMudhra)
description: Vendor (eMudhra) blog on quantum-safe PKI for Qatar enterprises. Explicit PQC but non-institutional, non-domestic vendor source. EXCLUDE.

title: Qatar Cybersecurity and technology developments late 2025 (US Dept of Commerce / trade.gov)
description: US Department of Commerce market intelligence noting Qatar's iGA and Qatar Central Bank are evaluating post-quantum guidelines. Foreign-government (US) source about Qatar; belongs to another entity. EXCLUDE for QAT.

title: Strategic National Alliance Establishes Qatar Quantum Encryption Infrastructure (INTLBM)
description: Journalism on QKD link between HBKU, Ooredoo and the Ministry of Defence. Quantum key distribution (not PQC) and a media source. EXCLUDE.

title: Aride announces establishment of first secure quantum communications link in Qatar (Al-Sharq)
description: Arabic journalism on first secure quantum (QKD) communications link in Qatar. QKD, not PQC; media source. EXCLUDE.

title: Cybersecurity experts: preparing for the post-quantum era is essential to protect data (Bloom Gate)
description: Arabic journalism: experts call to accelerate preparation for the post-quantum era. Explicit PQC but a media/blog source, not institutional. EXCLUDE.

title: Qatar National Cyber Security Strategy (National Security Archive PDF copy)
description: Copy of an (older) Qatar National Cyber Security Strategy hosted by the George Washington University National Security Archive. Third-party host; general cyber, no explicit PQC found. EXCLUDE.
